name: LLMChat
short: AI chat via LiteLLM/Ollama — responds only to @mentions in enabled channels.
description: Allows the bot to respond to @mentions in configured channels using any LiteLLM-compatible model, including local Ollama models.
author: Tyler-Staut
install_msg: Thanks for installing LLMChat! Run `[p]llmchat setup` to get started. Make sure `litellm` is installed: `pip install litellm`
